summary: Iteration 121: Tested studio.py split into modular package and new voice-preview endpoint. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified login flow, studio page loading at /studio?mode=directed, campaign type selector, CompanyModal opening correctly, and no JavaScript errors. The backend studio package split (11 modules) is working correctly with all existing endpoints functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend studio.py (5514 lines) successfully split into 11 modular files in /app/backend/routers/studio/ package
All existing studio endpoints work after package split: /api/studio/projects, /api/studio/voices, /api/studio/music-library, /api/studio/cache/stats, /api/studio/analytics/performance
New POST /api/studio/voice-preview endpoint correctly returns audio/mpeg blob for ElevenLabs TTS preview
Frontend PipelineView.jsx reduced from 3095 to 1807 lines by extracting ActivePipelineView, CompanyModal, AvatarModal
CompanyModal renders correctly with all form fields (name, phone, website, product, social links)
DirectedStudio mode auto-selected when navigating to /studio?mode=directed
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user test@agentflow.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 121 complete. Frontend PipelineView.jsx split with ActivePipelineView, CompanyModal, AvatarModal extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/pipeline/. Test credentials: test@agentflow.com / password123.
